Recent updates include the closure of a popular New Jersey park due to unstable ground, community health concerns over a Staten Island street widening near a former landfill, and the arrest of a NYC schools employee for multiple incidents of forcible touching involving students.

### Risks & Alerts

- Popular N.J. park suddenly closed due to ‘unstable ground’. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Staten Island street widening sparks community health concerns over nearby former landfill. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)

### Civics & Politics

- NYC schools employee arrested for multiple forcible touching incidents involving students in Queens.
